title: Walkthrough: wiring the v2 stack into the UI

segments.text: Wiring the v2 stack into the UI
segments.subtitle: agent-garrison · Model Router · Improver · runtimes · 2026-06-15

beats.caption: Compose: Model Router now fills the Orchestrator slot — capabilities resolve clean
beats.expectedScreen: the Compose overview for Dogfood Operative; station 01 Orchestrator shows Model Router; the header reads capabilities resolved; the sidebar Views group lists Improver and Model Router

beats.caption: Armory lists 18 Fittings now — Model Router, Improver, Knowledge, and the Codex / Gemini runtimes
beats.expectedScreen: the Armory registry grid showing 18 Fittings, with the Knowledge card highlighted among cards like Codex runtime and Gemini runtime

beats.caption: The Model Router view: each role maps to a concrete target through the active Profile
beats.expectedScreen: the Model Router Policy tab showing the ROLE to TARGET (BALANCED) table — expert maps to cc-opus-high, image and video map to sec-gemini

beats.caption: One shared matrix resolves every task-type × tier to a role — authored once, used by every Profile
beats.expectedScreen: the task-type by tier to role matrix grid with rows code, review, research, image, video, writing, ops, other

beats.caption: The Improver review queue: nightly proposals land here to approve or reject, with per-rule autonomy
beats.expectedScreen: the Improver — Review Queue view with Queue and Autonomy tabs and a Run Improver now button

segments.caption: Both views are live own-port servers — registered with Garrison and healthy
segments.expectedScreen: terminal: the views API lists model-router and improver among the registered own-port fittings, and both /health endpoints return ok:true
